prompt:
Ultra-detailed stylized 3D character design in a premium animated-film aesthetic, blending influences from modern indie animation, graffiti street culture, and cinematic comic-book visuals.

A cool urban skater character with exaggerated proportions, extra-long legs and arms, oversized layered streetwear, and a relaxed rebellious attitude. The character wears an oversized washed teal hoodie with stitched graphics and embroidered doodles, ultra-baggy distressed cargo jeans with hanging chains and patches, chunky worn-in skate sneakers, and fingerless gloves. Large retro headphones rest around the neck while a heavily customized backpack covered in stickers, smiley badges, graffiti tags, and skate-brand patches hangs loosely from one shoulder.

Face and hair:
expressive stylized face with sleepy confident eyes, subtle dark circles, slightly raised eyebrow, relaxed mouth expression, messy fluffy hair with asymmetrical strands and soft volume, cinematic character appeal, youthful street-style energy.

Pose:
standing casually beside a skateboard with one foot resting on the board, slouched posture, one hand inside hoodie pocket, head tilted slightly while looking off-camera with a bored-but-confident vibe.

Rendering style:
high-end cinematic 3D render, ultra-clean topology, smooth stylized anatomy, realistic fabric textures, subtle skin pores, global illumination lighting, soft ambient shadows, slight chromatic aberration, shallow depth of field, polished animated movie quality, realistic material response, vibrant but balanced color grading.

Environment:
minimal studio backdrop with soft gradient tones, clean centered composition, faint floor reflections, soft directional lighting.

Extra aesthetic details:
early-2000s skate culture inspiration, doodle art, graffiti decals, embroidered smiley motifs, scuffed skateboard edges, urban youth fashion energy, collectible designer-toy feel, cinematic character-sheet presentation.
